subcodes.first_line: We magnify from this station upon thee and upon My loved ones in that place, and We make mention of them with a remembrance that shall endure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نکبر من هذا المقام علیک و علی احبائی فی هناک و نذکرهم بذکر یکون باقیا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @prophecy and fulfillment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
